title: Filtering Possibility for View Only Links
excerpt:
There would be nice that when you use the share option when people can view your board or whatever you have created, that they also could filter on the viewable part. So that it would prevent scrolling.

posts.author: anthonyelite (Anthony Sellberg)
posts.cookedHtml:
There would be nice that when you use the share option when people can view your board or whatever you have created, that they also could filter on the viewable part. So that it would prevent scrolling.

So short description:

Filterable views in view only-shared boards
